title: GMS Week 48 - STUMPED, YET PRIMED!
summary:
Main
Global market chaos continues post-Thanksgiving like a bad stomach after too much turkey. Steel plate prices were thehighlight of the entire sub-continent-and even China-where they unanimously retreated in unison this week, while the U.S. Dollar also decided to join in on the fun as it too retreated at all sub-continent locations (except-no surprise-Turkey!).
